'''Borta''' was a [[Dolandu]] from the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] [[Skalokor]]. He was an old friend of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Niquon]] and was known to go to the Jedi for help. During the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], Borta came across a dismantled [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]]. He requested that Niquon take a look at the [[Droid/Legends|droid]], and Niquon's [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Nason Laric]] came to gather up the droid.<ref name="Jedi's Legacy" />
